title: Three Division World Champion At 26
hook: Just to be back in the mix, finally have a fight day
reason: Powerful aspirational content showing Rodriguez aiming for historic achievement at young age. The phrase 'three division world champion at 26 years old would be a huge accomplishment' is extremely clip-worthy and relatable for sports fans. Creates anticipation and showcases elite athlete mindset.

title: Inevitable Fireworks Predicted For Vargas Fight
hook: He applies a lot of pressure, he's fast as well
reason: Classic fight hype moment where Rodriguez breaks down his opponent and promises 'inevitable fireworks.' The contrast between styles and his confident prediction creates perfect anticipation content. Sports fans love pre-fight analysis and bold predictions from the fighters themselves.

title: Perfect Age To Move Weight Classes
hook: My body still hasn't fully capped off
reason: Authentic insight into fighter physiology and career timing that educates casual fans. The candid admission about weight cutting being 'harder than when I was 17, 18, but still doable' is relatable and shows the real sacrifices fighters make. Great educational sports content with personal vulnerability.
